text:
thanks for the understanding and support, <@U01JACR6L7L> :bow: I appreciate it.
but we/I should have looked into this much sooner as you and <@U01DZUA88S1> kindly already signaled the upcoming release back in February .. it just seemed so distant at that point ... and then out of the blue it's mid-April now :zipper_mouth_face:
I tried to clean up the remaining duplicate entries, but did not manage to finish that due to the many manual cross-checks  -- good point that some related automation would be useful, and some extra time for building that out would be indeed beneficial. sorry that I did not manage to produce this in time. I'll wrap up this patch anyway in the coming days, even after the deadline, just for the sake of practice and documenting the process and newly built tools on the way, so that we can easier do this in the future
